message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>
                  Using a method for pathogen screening in DNA synthesis orders, we have identified a number of amino acid sequences that distinguish 2019-nCoV (Wuhan Coronavirus) from all other known viruses in
                  <jats:italic>Coronaviridae</jats:italic>
                  . We find three main regions of unique sequence: two in the 1ab polyprotein QHO60603.1, one in surface glycoprotein QHO60594.1.
                </jats:p>
title: Highly Distinguished Amino Acid Sequences of 2019-nCoV (Wuhan Coronavirus)
